title: Implement a post-harvest program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a post-harvest program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for implementation of post-harvest operations

pcs.text: Identify post-harvest operations to be performed and requirements of the program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify post-harvest operations to be performed and requirements of the program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify post-harvest operations to be performed and requirements of the program.

pcs.text: Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery according to post-harvest operations requirements, and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery according to post-harvest operations requirements, and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery according to post-harvest operations requirements, and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Identify the Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points (HACCP) and food safety requirements applicable to crop under cultivation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points (HACCP) and food safety requirements applicable to crop under cultivation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points (HACCP) and food safety requirements applicable to crop under cultivation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for implementation of post-harvest operations

elements.title: Coordinate post-harvest work

pcs.text: Identify work team and coordinate tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work team and coordinate tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work team and coordinate tasks.

pcs.text: Undertake post-harvest operations according to post harvest program requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake post-harvest operations according to post harvest program requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake post-harvest operations according to post harvest program requirements.

pcs.text: Follow site quarantine protocols and farm and personal hygiene requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow site quarantine protocols and farm and personal hygiene requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow site quarantine protocols and farm and personal hygiene requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Coordinate post-harvest work

elements.title: Implement post-harvest treatments

pcs.text: Grade and label produce according to client specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Grade and label produce according to client specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Grade and label produce according to client specifications.

pcs.text: Identify and dispose of produce that does not meet client specifications or workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and dispose of produce that does not meet client specifications or workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and dispose of produce that does not meet client specifications or workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Select post-harvest treatments according to harvested produce requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select post-harvest treatments according to harvested produce requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select post-harvest treatments according to harvested produce requirements.

pcs.text: Confirm timing, rate, application method, environmental requirements and handling techniques conform to the requirements of the harvested produce
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm timing, rate, application method, environmental requirements and handling techniques conform to the requirements of the harvested produce?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm timing, rate, application method, environmental requirements and handling techniques conform to the requirements of the harvested produce.

pcs.text: Confirm post-harvest practices meet workplace requirements and minimise damage to produce
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm post-harvest practices meet workplace requirements and minimise damage to produce?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm post-harvest practices meet workplace requirements and minimise damage to produce.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and return tools, equipment and machinery to required location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and return tools, equipment and machinery to required location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and return tools, equipment and machinery to required location.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report unserviceable tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures.
